summary: Merge-main follow-up reuses the inherited Command Center recipe proof: visible dev-harness targets before and the Runs surface after real UI presses, with trace.json recording passive observations for press nodes. This run separately confirmed the PR branch was already up to date with origin/main and passed required validation.

before_after_pairs.label: Inherited passive observation UI link presses

videos.note: Inherited review MP4 generated from actual recipe screenshots because capture-helper failed to produce the expected file and CDP screencast captured zero frames in the original sandbox.
